title: Pre-op pregnancy status documentation
source_review_basis: committed exact-section summaries and evidence records; full guideline documents were not retained for this pass

investigations.text: Supports clinician-selected testing based on patient and procedure characteristics and offering pregnancy testing to patients of childbearing potential when the result would alter management.
investigations.rationale: The ASA advisory supports documenting pregnancy-status discussion or an offered or reviewed test when the result would alter management; it does not infer pregnancy or require testing automatically.
investigations.evidence_extract: Supports clinician-selected testing based on patient and procedure characteristics and offering pregnancy testing to patients of childbearing potential when the result would alter management.

source.title: Practice Advisory for Preanesthesia Evaluation: An Updated Report by the American Society of Anesthesiologists Task Force on Preanesthesia Evaluation

exact_section.heading: Preanesthesia testing and pregnancy testing
exact_section.locator: PDF pages 6-9, testing discussion and Appendix 1 summary

sources_used.title: Practice Advisory for Preanesthesia Evaluation: An Updated Report by the American Society of Anesthesiologists Task Force on Preanesthesia Evaluation

source_limitations: Age and reproductive context, consent, last menstrual period, contraception, pregnancy possibility, test offer, acceptance or refusal, test result, communication, privacy, procedure urgency, and clinician decision remain unsupported.
Any legacy item not explicitly mapped to an exact section remains unsupported pending qualified clinician review.
No mapping authorises an automatic diagnosis, differential, investigation, management decision, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, urgency conclusion, discharge decision, or patient instruction.
All prior supported legacy-item mappings were removed because canonical item-level applicability and workflow-specific rationale were not present in explicit repository records.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
